API Collection# MultipeerConnectivity Enumerations

## [Topics](/documentation/multipeerconnectivity/multipeerconnectivity_enumerations#topics)

### [Enumerations](/documentation/multipeerconnectivity/multipeerconnectivity_enumerations#Enumerations)

[`enum MCEncryptionPreference`](/documentation/multipeerconnectivity/mcencryptionpreference)Indicates whether a session should use encryption when communicating with nearby peers.[`enum Code`](/documentation/multipeerconnectivity/mcerror/code)Error codes found in [`MCErrorDomain`](/documentation/multipeerconnectivity/mcerrordomain) error domain `NSError` objects returned by methods in the Multipeer Connectivity framework.[`enum MCSessionSendDataMode`](/documentation/multipeerconnectivity/mcsessionsenddatamode)Indicates whether delivery of data should be guaranteed.[`enum MCSessionState`](/documentation/multipeerconnectivity/mcsessionstate)Indicates the current state of a given peer within a session.## [See Also](/documentation/multipeerconnectivity/multipeerconnectivity_enumerations#see-also)
